title: vignea curta
intro: Vignea curta, also known as the Dwarf Vignea or Small Vignea, is a perennial plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Vignea curta can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional cooking, although its use as a food ingredient is less common.
